scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html sw.js site.webmanifest www/ && cp -r css js assets www/
scripts.sync:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.open:android: npm run sync:android && npx cap open android
scripts.open:ios: npm run sync:ios && npx cap open ios
